message.content: Our entity-resolution fuzzy matcher is flagging too many false positives on short names. Tune the threshold.

content.text: I chose to switch from a fixed edit-distance threshold of 3 to a length-relative threshold of max(1, floor(len/4)) because short names (<= 6 chars) were collapsing into each other. I rejected a flat threshold of 2 because it hurt recall on long names where 3 edits are reasonable.
Yes: require a shared token prefix of length >= 2 for short-name matches. This is a refinement of entity-resolution, not a replacement.
Updated src/match/fuzzy.ts with the length-relative threshold and prefix guard.
